sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 387 & 388 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.19 2. For hearing of main case 02.02.2026 Mr. Faheem Ali Memon, advocate for the applicant Per learned counsel the observation recorded vide order dated 02.12.2025 is consistent with the facts, circumstances and under the law. He further states that the matter falls within the relevant Double Taxation Treaty. Under such circumstances he states that these references may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
